title: Register with Facebook - Positive Flow
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Facebook' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the Facebook login page.

title: Register with Google - Positive Flow
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Google' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the Google login page.

title: Register with Email Address - Positive Flow
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Email Address' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the email registration form.

title: Register with Facebook - Negative Flow
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Facebook' button.
expected_result: The user should not be redirected to the Facebook login page; an error message should be displayed.

title: Register with Google - Negative Flow
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Google' button.
expected_result: The user should not be redirected to the Google login page; an error message should be displayed.

title: Register with Email Address - Negative Flow
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Email Address' button.
expected_result: The user should not be redirected to the email registration form; an error message should be displayed.

title: Register with Facebook - Boundary/Validation
preconditions: The user is on the registration page for the 'buzzMuslim' app.
test_steps: Open the 'buzzMuslim' app. | Click on the 'Register with Facebook' button.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the Facebook login page with the correct parameters.
